title: Synthetic GB vehicle safety workflow checklist

items.requirement_summary: Collect vehicle identity, use context, inspection date, and separate safety-system findings.
items.control: Create one traceable inspection record with separate sections for each checked safety system.
acceptance_criteria: Evidence is linked to the vehicle identity.
Safety-system findings are not merged into one untraceable note.
unresolved_issues: Synthetic demo only; authorized GB 7258 clauses are required before production use.

items.requirement_summary: Collect vehicle configuration, measured dimensions, axle-load or mass values, units, and measurement context before evaluating limits.
items.control: Record measurement evidence and comparator assumptions before any limit check.
acceptance_criteria: Every measured value has a unit.
Vehicle configuration is available before comparison.
unresolved_issues: Synthetic demo only; authorized GB 1589 clauses are required before production use.

items.requirement_summary: Mark applicability as unresolved when vehicle configuration or special-use status is missing.
items.control: Block pass/fail answers until applicability evidence is available.
acceptance_criteria: Missing configuration data is resolved or explicitly escalated.
unresolved_issues: Requires real vehicle facts and authorized source text.
This checklist is a synthetic workflow artifact, not an authoritative GB compliance checklist.
Production use requires authorized source text and human review.
